title: Label Behavior
description: Schema for x-label behavior. Goes directly on a form control (input, select, textarea); its value is the label text. Creates a real <label>, associates it via for/id, and inserts it right before the control (to its left) by default.

label-position.description: Which side of the control the label renders on. "right" is for RTL layouts (Hebrew, Arabic).

wbBehavior.name: label
wbBehavior.description: Generates an associated <label> from an x-label="text" attribute on a form control; also enhances a plain <label x-label> with required/optional styling.

assertions.description: Generates a <label for> pointing at the control, with the attribute's value as its text
